SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-10-2009 Continued To Jun-10-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes befor the court on this day having been sent forthwith from department 206 foer a small claims appeal. The udge, Clerk, Denis D. Vegas, Plaintiff/Respondant Andres Flores, Defendant/Appellant Isidro Sanzeardo are present in court. Court and parties disciss the matter off of the record. Judgement is awarded in favor of plaintiff Flores, and against defendant Isidro Saenzpardo in the amount of $330.00.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
